prompt: My Prisma + PostgreSQL API is getting slow as data grows — some endpoints take 2-3 seconds. Can you do a full DB audit and tell me what's wrong?

assertions.description: Identifies N+1 in getUserDashboard — loop fetching orderItems per order individually
assertions.check: Report identifies N+1 or loop+query pattern in getUserDashboard

assertions.description: Flags missing @@index on FK fields: Order.userId, OrderItem.orderId, OrderItem.productId, Review.userId, Review.productId
assertions.check: Report mentions missing indexes and at least 2 of the specific FK fields

assertions.description: Flags placeOrder — multiple writes (order + items + stock) not wrapped in prisma.$transaction
assertions.check: Report flags missing transaction in placeOrder or createOrder function

assertions.description: Flags getProductDetail fetches the same product twice with findUnique
assertions.check: Report identifies redundant double-fetch of product in getProductDetail

assertions.description: Flags getAllProducts has no take/skip — unbounded result set
assertions.check: Report flags missing pagination or LIMIT on getAllProducts

assertions.description: Flags manual average calculation in getProductDetail instead of SQL AVG()
assertions.check: Report flags app-side average calculation that should be a SQL aggregate

assertions.description: Report is structured with severity tiers
assertions.check: Report contains at least two distinct severity levels for findings

assertions.description: Report does not modify schema.prisma or orderService.ts
assertions.check: No changes were written to the input files
